purpose: Golden fixture for Boiler Excess Oxygen Fuel Penalty Pro Pilot — GENERIC (quarantined)
reason: All 135 Pro formula modules use auto-generated generic template: all 7 outputs compute the same formula (operating_load * operating_time + measured_loss_indicator). decision_status, governing_driver, fmea_status are numeric when they should be string enums. No domain-specific boiler/excess oxygen logic exists. This tool cannot serve as a verified Pro pilot until a genuine domain-specific formula module is written.
